chapters.title: 操作系统核心(Operating System Core)

zh: 操作系统是管理计算机硬件与软件资源的系统软件，为用户提供接口
进程管理负责创建、调度和终止进程，实现多任务并发执行
内存管理负责分配和回收内存空间，实现虚拟内存和地址映射
文件管理提供文件的创建、删除、读写和组织功能
设备管理通过驱动程序控制硬件设备，提供统一的I/O接口
en: Operating system is system software that manages computer hardware and software resources
Process management handles creation, scheduling, and termination of processes for multitasking
Memory management allocates and deallocates memory space, implementing virtual memory
File management provides functions for creating, deleting, reading, and organizing files
Device management controls hardware through drivers, providing unified I/O interfaces

zh: 连续内存分配将内存划分为连续区域分配给进程
分页存储管理将物理内存和逻辑内存划分为固定大小的页框和页面
分段存储管理按程序的逻辑结构划分为不同长度的段
虚拟内存技术允许程序使用比物理内存更大的地址空间
页面置换算法如LRU、FIFO用于处理缺页中断时的页面替换
en: Contiguous memory allocation divides memory into continuous regions for processes
Paging divides physical and logical memory into fixed-size frames and pages
Segmentation divides memory based on program's logical structure into variable-length segments
Virtual memory allows programs to use address space larger than physical memory
Page replacement algorithms like LRU and FIFO handle page faults

zh: 文件是存储在存储设备上的命名数据集合，由操作系统统一管理
文件系统提供目录结构组织文件，支持层次化的文件管理
文件访问方法包括顺序访问、直接访问和索引访问
文件分配方式有连续分配、链接分配和索引分配
常见文件系统包括FAT、NTFS、ext4、APFS等
en: Files are named collections of data stored on storage devices, managed by the OS
Filesystems provide directory structures to organize files hierarchically
File access methods include sequential access, direct access, and indexed access
File allocation methods include contiguous, linked, and indexed allocation
Common filesystems include FAT, NTFS, ext4, and APFS

zh: 数据库是按照数据结构组织、存储和管理数据的仓库
数据库管理系统DBMS提供数据定义、操纵和控制功能
数据模型包括层次模型、网状模型和关系模型
数据库系统由数据库、DBMS、应用程序和数据库管理员组成
数据库的主要特点包括数据共享、数据独立性和数据完整性
en: Database is an organized collection of structured data stored and managed efficiently
Database Management System provides data definition, manipulation, and control functions
Data models include hierarchical, network, and relational models
Database system consists of database, DBMS, applications, and database administrator
Key database features include data sharing, independence, and integrity

zh: 关系模型由E.F.Codd于1970年提出，是目前最流行的数据模型
关系是一张二维表，由行和列组成，每行称为元组，每列称为属性
主键是能唯一标识关系中每个元组的最小属性集
外键用于建立表与表之间的关系，实现参照完整性
关系代数提供选择、投影、连接等操作来查询数据
en: Relational model was proposed by E.F. Codd in 1970 and is the most popular data model
A relation is a two-dimensional table consisting of rows and columns
Primary key is the minimal set of attributes that uniquely identifies each tuple
Foreign key establishes relationships between tables for referential integrity
Relational algebra provides operations like selection, projection, and join

zh: SQL是结构化查询语言，是关系数据库的标准语言
DDL数据定义语言用于创建、修改和删除数据库对象
DML数据操纵语言用于查询、插入、更新和删除数据
DCL数据控制语言用于授权和回收数据库访问权限
SELECT语句用于从数据库中查询数据，支持WHERE、GROUP BY等子句
en: SQL is Structured Query Language, the standard language for relational databases
DDL Data Definition Language creates, modifies, and deletes database objects
DML Data Manipulation Language queries, inserts, updates, and deletes data
DCL Data Control Language grants and revokes database access permissions
SELECT statement retrieves data from database with WHERE, GROUP BY clauses

zh: 第一范式1NF要求每个属性值都是不可再分的原子值
第二范式2NF在满足1NF的基础上，消除非主属性对主键的部分依赖
第三范式3NF在满足2NF的基础上，消除非主属性对主键的传递依赖
BCNF在满足3NF的基础上，消除主属性对候选键的部分和传递依赖
规范化通过分解关系模式来消除数据冗余和更新异常
en: First Normal Form requires all attribute values to be atomic and indivisible
Second Normal Form eliminates partial dependencies of non-key attributes on primary key
Third Normal Form eliminates transitive dependencies of non-key attributes on primary key
BCNF eliminates partial and transitive dependencies of prime attributes on candidate keys
Normalization decomposes relation schemas to eliminate redundancy and anomalies

zh: 原子性Atomicity保证事务中的所有操作要么全部完成，要么全部不完成
一致性Consistency确保事务执行前后数据库处于一致状态
隔离性Isolation保证并发事务之间互不干扰
持久性Durability确保已提交事务的结果永久保存在数据库中
ACID特性是关系数据库事务处理的核心保证
en: Atomicity ensures all operations in a transaction complete entirely or not at all
Consistency ensures database remains in a consistent state before and after transaction
Isolation guarantees concurrent transactions do not interfere with each other
Durability ensures committed transaction results are permanently saved
ACID properties are core guarantees of relational database transaction processing

zh: 计算机网络是将地理位置不同的独立计算机系统通过通信设备互连的集合
计算机网络的主要功能包括数据通信、资源共享和分布式处理
按覆盖范围可分为个人网PAN、局域网LAN、城域网MAN和广域网WAN
网络拓扑结构包括总线型、星型、环型、树型和网状型
网络协议是通信双方必须遵守的规则和约定
en: Computer network is a collection of independent computer systems connected by communication devices
Main network functions include data communication, resource sharing, and distributed processing
By coverage: PAN, LAN, MAN, and WAN
Network topologies include bus, star, ring, tree, and mesh
Network protocols are rules and conventions that communicating parties must follow

zh: OSI参考模型是国际标准化组织提出的七层网络通信模型
物理层负责比特流的透明传输，定义电气和机械特性
数据链路层提供节点到节点的可靠传输，处理帧的封装和差错控制
网络层负责寻址和路由选择，实现分组从源到目的地的传输
传输层提供端到端的可靠数据传输服务，包括TCP和UDP协议
en: OSI reference model is a seven-layer network communication model by ISO
Physical layer handles transparent bit transmission, defining electrical and mechanical characteristics
Data link layer provides node-to-node reliable transmission with framing and error control
Network layer handles addressing and routing for packet delivery
Transport layer provides end-to-end reliable data transfer including TCP and UDP

zh: TCP/IP是互联网的基础协议栈，采用四层模型
网络接口层负责与物理网络的接口，处理帧的收发
网际层IP负责寻址和路由，提供无连接的数据报服务
传输层TCP提供面向连接的可靠传输，UDP提供无连接服务
应用层包含HTTP、FTP、SMTP等协议，为应用程序提供网络服务
en: TCP/IP is the foundational Internet protocol suite using a four-layer model
Network interface layer handles physical network interface and frame transmission
Internet layer IP provides addressing, routing, and connectionless datagram service
Transport layer TCP offers connection-oriented reliable transfer, UDP offers connectionless service
Application layer includes HTTP, FTP, SMTP protocols for application networking

zh: HTTP是超文本传输协议，是Web应用的基础协议
HTTP使用请求-响应模型，客户端发送请求，服务器返回响应
HTTP方法包括GET、POST、PUT、DELETE等，用于不同操作
HTTP状态码表示请求处理结果，如200成功、404未找到、500服务器错误
HTTPS通过SSL/TLS加密HTTP通信，提供安全的数据传输
en: HTTP is HyperText Transfer Protocol, the foundation of Web applications
HTTP uses request-response model where client sends requests and server returns responses
HTTP methods include GET, POST, PUT, DELETE for different operations
HTTP status codes indicate request results: 200 success, 404 not found, 500 server error
HTTPS encrypts HTTP communication using SSL/TLS for secure data transfer

chapters.title: 信息安全与伦理(Information Security & Ethics)

zh: 防火墙是网络安全的屏障，控制进出网络的流量
入侵检测系统IDS监控网络流量，识别潜在的安全威胁
虚拟专用网络VPN通过加密隧道在公共网络上建立安全连接
网络分段将网络划分为多个区域，限制攻击的扩散范围
安全审计记录网络活动，用于事后分析和合规检查
en: Firewalls act as network security barriers controlling inbound and outbound traffic
Intrusion Detection Systems monitor network traffic for potential security threats
VPNs establish secure connections over public networks through encrypted tunnels
Network segmentation divides networks into zones to limit attack spread
Security auditing records network activities for analysis and compliance

zh: 对称加密使用相同密钥进行加密和解密，如AES算法
非对称加密使用公钥加密、私钥解密，如RSA算法
哈希函数将任意长度输入转换为固定长度输出，如SHA-256
数字签名使用私钥签名、公钥验证，确保数据完整性和身份认证
数字证书由可信第三方颁发，绑定公钥与实体身份
en: Symmetric encryption uses the same key for encryption and decryption, like AES
Asymmetric encryption uses public key for encryption and private key for decryption, like RSA
Hash functions convert variable-length input to fixed-length output, like SHA-256
Digital signatures use private key for signing and public key for verification
Digital certificates issued by trusted third parties bind public keys to entity identities

zh: 恶意软件包括病毒、蠕虫、木马、勒索软件等威胁系统安全
网络钓鱼通过伪造可信实体诱骗用户泄露敏感信息
拒绝服务攻击DoS通过大量请求耗尽目标资源，使其无法服务
中间人攻击MITM拦截并可能篡改通信双方的数据
零日漏洞是尚未被公开或修补的安全漏洞
en: Malware includes viruses, worms, trojans, and ransomware threatening system security
Phishing tricks users into revealing sensitive information by impersonating trusted entities
Denial of Service attacks exhaust target resources with excessive requests
Man-in-the-Middle attacks intercept and potentially modify communications
Zero-day vulnerabilities are security flaws not yet publicly disclosed or patched

zh: 数据隐私保护个人敏感信息不被非法收集、使用或泄露
个人身份信息PII包括姓名、身份证号、生物特征等可识别个人身份的信息
数据脱敏通过匿名化或假名化处理，降低数据泄露风险
隐私增强技术PETs如差分隐私、同态加密保护数据隐私
GDPR和CCPA等法规规范了个人数据的收集和处理
en: Data privacy protects personal sensitive information from illegal collection or disclosure
Personally Identifiable Information includes names, IDs, and biometric data
Data anonymization and pseudonymization reduce breach risks
Privacy-Enhancing Technologies like differential privacy protect data privacy
Regulations like GDPR and CCPA govern personal data collection and processing

zh: 计算伦理研究信息技术使用中的道德问题和社会影响
算法偏见指算法可能对特定群体产生不公平的结果
人工智能伦理关注AI系统的透明度、可解释性和责任归属
专业道德规范要求计算机专业人员遵守诚实、保密和胜任等准则
技术决策应考虑对社会、环境和人类福祉的影响
en: Computing ethics studies moral issues and social impacts of information technology use
Algorithmic bias refers to unfair outcomes against specific groups from algorithms
AI ethics concerns transparency, explainability, and accountability of AI systems
Professional ethics require honesty, confidentiality, and competence from practitioners
Technology decisions should consider impacts on society, environment, and human welfare

zh: 知识产权保护创造性智力成果，包括版权、专利、商标和商业秘密
软件版权保护源代码和目标代码的表达形式
开源许可证如GPL、MIT规定了软件的使用、修改和分发条件
软件专利保护软件中的技术创新和算法发明
尊重知识产权是计算机专业人员的基本职业道德
en: Intellectual property protects creative works including copyright, patents, trademarks, and trade secrets
Software copyright protects the expression of source and object code
Open source licenses like GPL and MIT govern software use, modification, and distribution
Software patents protect technical innovations and algorithm inventions
Respecting intellectual property is basic professional ethics for computing professionals
